expectations.evidence: structure assertion without compare_args falls back to LLM judge

expectations.text: the audit should report zero high-severity findings (manifest drift, license gaps, broken cross-references); marketplace is currently healthy per the latest run
expectations.evidence: structure assertion without compare_args falls back to LLM judge

expectations.text: the agent should run the full marketplace-health audit pipeline (manifest consistency + license coverage + cross-reference integrity + docs-reflect-state) rather than checking just one dimension

expectations.text: the response should name specific medium/low findings (if any) with file paths and remediation steps, not just a binary 'healthy' verdict
expectations.evidence: The agent provided no findings at all; it only asked clarifying questions ('Which marketplace?', 'What URL or platform should I target?', 'Are there specific health check criteria you want me to verify?').
